endpoints.name: find_people
endpoints.description: List people, with filter DSL + cursor pagination.

endpoints.name: get_person
endpoints.description: Fetch one person by id (live rows only).

endpoints.name: add_person
endpoints.description: Create a person (concierge-sourced).

endpoints.name: update_person
endpoints.description: Patch a person; firstSeen + lastInteractionAt are not settable.

endpoints.name: tombstone_person
endpoints.description: Soft-delete a person; sets suppressReingest=true.

endpoints.name: get_interactions_for
endpoints.description: List interactions where the person is a participant.

endpoints.name: find_organizations
endpoints.description: List organizations.

endpoints.name: get_organization
endpoints.description: Fetch one organization by id (live rows only).

endpoints.name: add_organization
endpoints.description: Create an organization.

endpoints.name: update_organization
endpoints.description: Patch an organization.

endpoints.name: tombstone_organization
endpoints.description: Soft-delete an organization.

endpoints.name: list_interactions
endpoints.description: List interactions with filter DSL + cursor pagination.

endpoints.name: log_interaction
endpoints.description: Insert an interaction; updates lastInteractionAt on each participant via $max.

endpoints.name: tombstone_interaction
endpoints.description: Soft-delete an interaction. Does NOT roll back lastInteractionAt.

endpoints.name: list_followups
endpoints.description: List followups (default status=open).

endpoints.name: create_followup
endpoints.description: Create a followup. Mashiro sets direction.

endpoints.name: update_followup
endpoints.description: Update a followup status (complete/snooze/dismiss).

endpoints.name: tombstone_followup
endpoints.description: Soft-delete a followup.

endpoints.name: list_contexts
endpoints.description: Distinct context tags + counts across active, non-tombstoned interactions. Filter by personId to scope.

endpoints.name: get_digest
endpoints.description: Overdue + upcoming open followups within the window (default P7D). Each followup is hydrated with {id, displayName, primaryEmail} for its person.

endpoints.name: get_gmail_sync_state
endpoints.description: Return the Gmail sync state (historyId, lastRunAt, errors, pause).

endpoints.name: run_gmail_sync
endpoints.description: Run a Gmail sync pass synchronously. Bootstrap on first run; incremental thereafter. Returns counts + final historyId.

endpoints.name: get_calendar_sync_state
endpoints.description: Return the Calendar sync state.

endpoints.name: run_calendar_sync
endpoints.description: Run a Calendar sync pass synchronously. Bootstrap on first run; sync-token-incremental thereafter. Reconciles edits + cancellations on existing events.
